title: Quaint Atmosphere
description: Aims to enhance the atmosphere of the game with animated elements using core game shaders
body:
Have you ever thought to yourself that Minecraft may benefit from some touch of life? All blocks are pretty much static, biomes may sometimes look a bit too similar to each other, there are not many animals where there should be plenty

 This pack (Currently in development) aims to _enhance_ the atmosphere of Minecraft with animations and ambient effects, and while most packs like this do that using mods such as Polytone, this is an exception. This pack utilizes core shader rewriting to change how the game renders blocks, mobs and lighting, giving it more creative freedom and the ability to work in Vanilla Minecraft!

 More information in the [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quaint_atmosphere/changelog) and [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quaint_atmosphere/gallery)

> ⚠️Warning⚠️
> 
> Currently Sodium-incompatible. May cause issues on some clients
> 
> If you regularly encounter FPS lag while playing, installing [It Just Works: Niche Optimization Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/it-just-works-niche-optimization-pack) is recommended
